title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 30.110 - Certificate — action of general assembly
text:
30.110.  Certificate — action of general assembly. — When the certificate mentioned in section 30.100 shall be laid before the general assembly, if it approve the same, it shall cause the proper entries to be made in the books of the state treasurer, and if it disapprove thereof, it shall cause another settlement to be made.
(RSMo 1939 § 13067, A.L. 1945 p. 1977 § 31) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11450; 1919 § 13356; 1909 § 11857
